questionHtml:
The size of a nucleus can be estimated from electron diffraction experiments. What is the order of magnitude of the de Broglie wavelength of the electrons in these experiments?


A.  10−15 m

B.  10−13 m

C.  10−11 m

D.  10−9 m

meta.title: The size of a nucleus can be estimated from electron diffraction experiments. What is the order of magnitude of the de Broglie wavelength of the electrons in these experiments? A.
